title: Angle (brand-side instance)
description: Angle stored at brands/{slug}/angles/{ANG-N}.json. Produced by produce-paid-angles (light pass: lineage + meta) and enriched on demand by decompose-angle (deep pass: recursive formula). One file per angle. Many-to-many with audiences (an angle can serve multiple audiences with different mechanics).

angle_id.description: ANG-NN format (ANG-01, ANG-12, ANG-103). Stable id, never reassigned.

name.description: Operator-facing label. E.g. 'Le miroir, encore', 'Vies plurielles', 'Le calcul caché'.

audience_slug.description: Primary audience this angle was produced for. Matches a folder under brands/{slug}/audiences/. Cross-audience compatibility lives in compatibility[].

source.description: Origin axis of the angle (5 sources). audience-derived = built from audience pain/desire. product-derived = built from spec/mechanism. category-derived = built from market context vs alternatives. brand-derived = built from brand identity/tone. temporal-cultural = built from a moment, trend, or cultural pivot. Inferred from the production trigger context.

awareness_movement.description: Awareness state the angle ASSUMES at start (in) and AIMS to produce at end (out). Distinct from a static stage tag. If in == out, the angle validates. If in < out, the angle educates (more costly, more differentiating). If in > out, the angle regresses (deliberate re-funnel or error).

in.description: Awareness stage assumed at the start. Hard rule: must be ≤ audience.awareness_dominant for the angle to be playable on that audience.

out.description: Awareness stage the angle aims to produce by the end.

lineage.description: Flat canon lineage written by produce-paid-angles (v2.27 light pass). References resources/canon/copy/{layer}/{tool}.json entries.

formula.description: Compositional decomposition Angle = Observation + Tension + Reframe + Bridge. Light pass: components named (one-line each). Deep pass: each component decomposed to atoms (verbatim, source, sample_size, etc.) by decompose-angle skill. Atoms stop at observed or declared field types.

observation.description: What the audience already perceives or could be shown. Atoms: phenomenon (what is observed), source (where it comes from), sample_size (how many).

summary.description: Light pass: one-line phrasing of the observation.

phenomenon.description: Deep pass: the observable behavior, situation, or fact.

source.description: Deep pass: where this observation comes from. E.g. 'Trustpilot karacare', 'Reddit r/HairCare', 'self-reported in audience VoM'.

sample_size.description: Deep pass: how many verbatims or data points support this observation.

tension.description: The gap between what is and what could be. Atoms: state_actual, state_desired, reason_blocked.

summary.description: Light pass: one-line phrasing of the tension.

state_actual.description: Deep pass: what the audience experiences today.

state_desired.description: Deep pass: what the audience aspires to.

reason_blocked.description: Deep pass: why the gap is not closed (external obstacle, internal belief, lack of awareness).

reframe.description: The perceptual pivot the angle proposes. Atoms: perceptual_pivot (before/after the shift), pivot_mechanism (why the shift makes sense).

summary.description: Light pass: one-line phrasing of the reframe.

perceptual_pivot.description: Deep pass: before-vs-after of how the audience sees the situation.

pivot_mechanism.description: Deep pass: the rational or emotional lever that makes the pivot believable.

bridge.description: How the product fits into the reframed worldview. Atoms: spec_activated (which product feature), benefit_served (which outcome), promise_formulated (what the audience hears).

summary.description: Light pass: one-line phrasing of the bridge.

spec_activated.description: Deep pass: spec id from products/{slug}/spec.json that this angle leverages.

benefit_served.description: Deep pass: benefit_id from spec.json#benefits[] that the angle promises.

promise_formulated.description: Deep pass: the exact promise wording the audience walks away with.

compatibility.description: Other audiences this angle could serve (cross-audience reuse). Empty by default. Populated when an angle proves transferable.

intensity_levers.description: Optional creative intensity dials (Big Idea framing, Mechanism Reveal, Stake Raising, etc.). Free-form, populated when relevant.

validation_status.description: Lifecycle. hypothesis = not yet tested in campaign. tested = ad set launched, results inconclusive. validated = CPA/ROAS confirmed viable. scaled = significant budget allocated. fatigued = performance declining. Initialized to 'hypothesis' by produce-paid-angles. Updated by learn-from-session when outcome captured.

created_by_skill.description: Which skill generated this angle. E.g. 'produce-paid-angles'.

test_results.description: Append-only log of test outcomes. Each entry references a campaign / ad set and the observed CPA/ROAS/CTR.
